display_information.name: Morgenruf
display_information.description: Self-hosted daily standup bot - structured updates, per-project tracking, blocker detection.
display_information.long_description:
Morgenruf runs your team's daily standups directly in Slack — no expensive SaaS required.
 
Each day at your configured time, it DMs team members 3 questions, 
collects answers privately, and posts a clean summary to your team channel.
 
 Features:
 • Configurable schedule (time, timezone, days)
 • Per-project tagging for automated reporting
 • Blocker detection and highlighting
 • Open source (MIT) — self-host or use our hosted version at morgenruf.dev
